# a + a + n > Be9 + g   [a_a_n__Be9_g]   ref=NACRE  (analytic, PRIMAT-main.m)
# forward[T9] = With[{T932=T9^(3/2),T923=T9^(2/3),T913=T9^(1/3)}, With[{he4abe8= 2.43*^9*(1.+74.5*T9)/T923*Exp[-13.49/T913-(T9/0.15)^2]+6.09*^5/T932*Exp[-1.054/T9]}, If[T9<0.03, (he4abe8)* 6.69*^-12*(1.-192*T9+2.48*^4*T9^2-1.50*^6*T9^3+4.13*^7*T9^4-3.90*^8*T9^5), (he4abe8)* 2.42*^-12*(1.-1.52*Log10[T9]+0.448*(Log10[T9])^2+0.435*(Log10[T9])^3)]]]   uncertainty factor f = 1.25
